Label: 1. Intake
Description: New internal signals, referrals, support notes, and discovery starts enter here before CRM qualification.

Label: 2. Qualification
Description: Decide whether the signal is qualified, disqualified, nurture, proposal recommended, or converted.

Label: 3. Engagement Pipeline
Description: Track the relationship stage, package path, decision status, value, probability, and next action.

Label: 4. Decision / Proposal
Description: Keep decision blockers, proposal work, and go-live blockers visible until resolved.

Label: 5. Active Delivery
Description: Move qualified work into onboarding, active delivery, sustainment, or blocked execution control.

Label: 6. Handoff Evidence
Description: End each workflow with a durable evidence, scope, artifact, or handoff packet pointer.
